description: O2 Czech Republic is a telecommunications provider offering mobile, internet, TV/streaming, and business services in the Czech Republic. Its published developer-facing data APIs provide aggregated mobility and socio-demographic statistics based on activity in the O2 mobile network.
summary: O2 Czech Republic exposes two documented public REST APIs under developer.o2.cz: Mobility API and Socio-demo API, both described by OpenAPI specs and with no authentication defined in the published specs.
